TextView.android:text:
Hydration Guide

1. Plain Water
The best way to stay hydrated; regulates body temperature and flushes out toxins.

2. Lemon Water
Adds a boost of Vitamin C and antioxidants; aids digestion and improves skin glow.

3. Coconut Water
Natural source of electrolytes like potassium; great for rehydration after light exercise.

4. Infused Water
Water with cucumber, mint, or berries; makes drinking water more flavorful without added sugar.

5. Herbal Tea
Caffeine-free options like chamomile or peppermint; provides hydration along with calming benefits.

6. Water-Rich Fruits
Watermelon and strawberries are over 90% water; perfect for snacking and staying hydrated.

7. Hydrating Vegetables
Cucumber and celery have high water content; they provide fiber along with essential fluids.

8. Aloe Vera Juice
Known for its hydrating and healing properties; supports gut health and skin hydration.

9. Low-Fat Milk
Surprisingly effective for rehydration; contains a balance of electrolytes, protein, and carbs.

10. Vegetable Broth
A savory way to hydrate; provides essential minerals and helps maintain fluid balance.
